name: Carrot and Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mixed dried fruit (raisins, chopped prunes, or apricots)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the bran, wheat germ, whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, Lite Salt, shredded carrots, mixed dried fruit, and chopped walnuts or almonds until evenly distributed.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites lightly and stir in milk, molasses, and oil until smooth.
5. Pour the liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
6. Fill each muffin cup about 3/4 full with the batter.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Makes 18 muffins.
